## What this changes

Briefly describe the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behavior
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests` passes
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall -q scripts tests` passes
- [ ] `python3 scripts/marshmallow.py doctor --workspace examples/builder-graph --json` passes
- [ ] Docs updated where a contract, command, or schema changed
- [ ] Working tree is clean (`git diff --exit-code`)
- [ ] Change respects the Deliberate Non-Goals (ARCHITECTURE.md)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — tradeoffs, follow-ups, open questions.
